TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: nai'ay maazih a lacul ku lalangwan. caay ku sakacakat dada'atu sakatineng tu lalangwan, itini tu i kalacacay a mangaleb a kasasuini payniay tu lalangawan. payni tu i nu kamuay ku sapatahkal atu palaw, mitu'tu', kananaman a a kawaw, nu siyakay lisin a a kawaw, atu payniay i tineng tu lalayanay atu lisin. sisa, nai'ay maazih a lacul nu lalangwan caay ku nu babalakiay, laylay, atu kasasizuma nu zumaay a binacadan, wiza u nikasikaz, mizawis tu masasizumaay a kakitizaan atu mahicaay tu a kauzip, u masupeday, matatungusay i binacadan, a patahkal tu siyakayay lalangawan atu pabaluhay kawaw.
S.PHON: nai Ē~ °aj maazińß a r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ ku r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčwan. ¶aaj ku saka ¶akat dada Ē~ °atu sakatin…ôŇč tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčwan, itini tu i kar~…ĺa ¶a ¶aj a maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb a kasasuini pajniaj tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. pajni tu i nu kamuaj ku sapatańßkar~…ĺ atu par~…ĺaw, mitu Ē~ °tu Ē~ °, kananaman a a kawaw, nu sijakaj r~…ĺisin a a kawaw, atu pajniaj i tin…ôŇč tu r~…ĺar~…ĺajanaj atu r~…ĺisin. sisa, nai Ē~ °aj maazińß a r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčwan ¶aaj ku nu babar~…ĺakiaj, r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj, atu kasasizuma nu zumaaj a bina ¶adan, wiza u nikasikaz, mizawis tu masasizumaaj a kakitizaan atu mańßi ¶aaj tu a kauzip, u masup…ôdaj, matatuŇčusaj i bina ¶adan, a patańßkar~…ĺ tu sijakajaj r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan atu pabar~…ĺuńßaj kawaw.
S.FORM: nai'ay maazih a lacul ku lalangwan. caay ku sakacakat dada'atu sakatineng tu lalangwan, itini tu i kalacacay a mangaleb a kasasuini payniay tu lalangawan. payni tu i nu kamuay ku sapatahkal atu palaw, mitu'tu', kananaman a a kawaw, nu siyakay lisin a a kawaw, atu payniay i tineng tu lalayanay atu lisin. sisa, nai'ay maazih a lacul nu lalangwan caay ku nu babalakiay, laylay, atu kasasizuma nu zumaay a binacadan, wiza u nikasikaz, mizawis tu masasizumaay a kakitizaan atu mahicaay tu a kauzip, u masupeday, matatungusay i binacadan, a patahkal tu siyakayay lalangawan atu pabaluhay kawaw.
S.PHON: nai Ē~ °aj maazińß a r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ ku r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčwan. ¶aaj ku saka ¶akat dada Ē~ °atu sakatin…ôŇč tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčwan, itini tu i kar~…ĺa ¶a ¶aj a maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb a kasasuini pajniaj tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. pajni tu i nu kamuaj ku sapatańßkar~…ĺ atu par~…ĺaw, mitu Ē~ °tu Ē~ °, kananaman a a kawaw, nu sijakaj r~…ĺisin a a kawaw, atu pajniaj i tin…ôŇč tu r~…ĺar~…ĺajanaj atu r~…ĺisin. sisa, nai Ē~ °aj maazińß a r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčwan ¶aaj ku nu babar~…ĺakiaj, r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj, atu kasasizuma nu zumaaj a bina ¶adan, wiza u nikasikaz, mizawis tu masasizumaaj a kakitizaan atu mańßi ¶aaj tu a kauzip, u masup…ôdaj, matatuŇčusaj i bina ¶adan, a patańßkar~…ĺ tu sijakajaj r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan atu pabar~…ĺuńßaj kawaw.
